deviations.description: The process model, as shown in the diagram on page 1, only restricts issuing a SIM card to customers with debt less than 100 €. The updated requirement prohibits issuing a SIM card to customers with debt exceeding 50 €, which is stricter. Therefore, the process allows issuing SIM cards to customers with debt between 50.01 € and 100 €, directly violating the new requirement.
